summary: Bug fix + feature session — explode fix, DracoLoader, large-file progress, panel maximize/focus, PDF export.

fixes.explode_broken: explode() used c.position (local space) to compute direction vs ctr (world space). For any multi-part hierarchy the directions were wrong. Fix: c.getWorldPosition(wp) to get world position, direction = wp.sub(ctr). Explosion factor now relative to model bounding box size so it scales correctly for any unit system.
fixes.render_loses_properties: GLB/GLTF files with Draco-compressed geometry had no DracoLoader attached — geometry silently failed. Fix: import DRACOLoader in Three.js bootstrap, pre-configure decoder path (gstatic.com/draco), expose as window.__TL.dracoLoader. renderer.js attaches it to GLTFLoader before parse. FBX + GLTF now use Object URL via loader.load() instead of loader.parse() so embedded materials/textures resolve correctly.
fixes.large_file_progress: file.arrayBuffer() gave no feedback for 200MB+ files. Replaced with FileReader + onprogress in readFileWithProgress(). Files ≥30MB show the loading overlay with % progress. renderer.js shows a 'Parsing XMB — browser may be unresponsive' toast before the synchronous Three.js parse, with a 60ms yield so the toast renders first.
fixes.panel_maximize: Both bottom analysis boxes now have maximize/focus controls. btn-pan-max (⤢ in analysis-hdr) makes #panel-analysis position:fixed inset:0 (full screen). btn-focus-report (⤢ floating in #analysis-body) focuses just the report. btn-focus-chat (⤢ in achat-hdr) focuses just the chat. All auto-maximize the panel when activating focus.
fixes.pdf_export: analysis.js adds printReport() — opens a new window with styled HTML of the report, metadata header, and a Print/Save-as-PDF button. Exposed on window.__pandaAnalysis.printReport. index.html adds '🖨 PDF' button next to '💾 Save', disabled state mirrors Save button via MutationObserver.
fixes.sw: Bumped to v7. Added DRACOLoader + Draco WASM decoder files to pre-cache list.

messages.content: resume the previous conversation here about pandaai
